channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Spain and Argentina's World Cup trophy count before 2026 final
item.description: When Spain and Argentina face off Sunday in the World Cup final, it will mark only the second meeting between the two sides in the tournament's history.

item.title: Iran live updates: Kuwait, Bahrain report Iranian attacks following latest US strikes
item.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: How to watch the 2026 FIFA Men's World Cup today
item.description: Spain will face Argentina in the 2026 FIFA Men's World Cup final match on July 19. Here's how and when to watch the soccer game.

item.title: WATCH: Manhole rescue in Northeast Philadelphia
item.description: Emergency crews spent more than 30 minutes pulling a man from a manhole in the Bell's Corner neighborhood.
